text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
As predicted, Narita Brian is competing. The
morning news is calling this the "sister showdown
of the century."

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Of course, the victor of said showdown will
obviously be me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Time for me to go. I have a promise to keep with
Brian.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I can't even remember the last time we raced each
other.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're strong now, Brian. You're the strongest
Triple Crown Champion ever, in fact. No wonder
they call you the Beast.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But if you're "the beast," what does that make me
as your big sister?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I forged the path that brought you here today.
Don't think for a second you're leaving here with
the win.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And catch me if you can!
